All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Sidebar & Tree

Scrollable story hierarchy with collapsible groups, active leaf highlighting, and category badges.

Full Sidebar

Story Hierarchy 42
Components
Button / Primary story Button / Secondary Input / Text Input / Password Toggle / Default Checkbox
Patterns
Navigation Shell Settings Form Empty State Error Boundary
Design System
Color Tokens Typography Spacing Shadows

Selected story

Click any tree item to simulate navigation. The .is-active class applies the primary accent stripe to the left edge of the active leaf.

The sidebar uses a sticky header for always-visible title + badge, and renders groups with .cf-tree-group for visual separation.

<aside class="cf-sidebar cf-scrollbar">
  <div class="cf-sidebar-header">
    <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between">
      <strong>Story Hierarchy</strong>
      <span class="badge text-bg-primary">42</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <nav class="cf-tree">
    <div class="cf-tree-group">
      <div class="cf-tree-label"><i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i>Components</div>
      <a class="cf-tree-item is-active" href="/stories/button--primary">
        <i class="bi bi-record-circle"></i>Button / Primary
        <span class="cf-tree-badge">story</span>
      </a>
      <a class="cf-tree-item" href="/stories/button--secondary">
        <i class="bi bi-circle"></i>Button / Secondary
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="cf-tree-group">
      <div class="cf-tree-label"><i class="bi bi-bezier2"></i>Design System</div>
      <a class="cf-tree-item" href="/stories/color-tokens">
        <i class="bi bi-palette"></i>Color Tokens
      </a>
    </div>
  </nav>
</aside>

Tree Label Variants

Open folder
Closed folder
Patterns group
Design tokens

Item States

States
Default item Active item (current story) Disabled / hidden item

Resize Handle

Place .cf-resize-handle between the sidebar and center columns to allow drag-resizing. It renders as a 4px transparent column that highlights primary on hover.

<div class="cf-workbench">
  <aside class="cf-sidebar">…</aside>
  <div class="cf-resize-handle" role="separator" aria-orientation="vertical"></div>
  <main class="cf-center">…</main>
</div>

Search Integration

Add data-cf-search to the search input and data-cf-label="…" to each tree item. components.js hides non-matching items on input.

<input class="form-control" type="search" placeholder="Search stories…" data-cf-search>

<!-- In the tree: -->
<a class="cf-tree-item" href="#" data-cf-label="button primary">Button / Primary</a>
<a class="cf-tree-item" href="#" data-cf-label="input text">Input / Text</a>

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-sidebarScrollable column with surface background and right border.
.cf-sidebar-headerSticky title row at the top of the sidebar.
.cf-treePadding wrapper for a group of tree items.
.cf-tree-groupAdds bottom margin between sibling groups.
.cf-tree-labelSection heading — uppercase, letter-spaced, non-interactive.
.cf-tree-itemNavigable leaf. Add .is-active for the selected story.
.cf-tree-badgeRight-aligned tag (e.g. "story", "docs"). Auto margin-left:auto.
.cf-resize-handle4px drag target between sidebar and center. Cursor: col-resize.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
